summary: A USCIS Alien Registration Requirement PSA ('Stay on the right side of the law') using branded title cards and benign stock B-roll (a small-town street, hands typing on a laptop) under a plain instructional voiceover explaining who must register and who is exempt. It is a routine informational compliance promo with no music or genre styling, so out of scope.
notable_text: ARR Alien Registration Requirement; Registering with USCIS ensures; You don't have to register; FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION
